executives.name: Teitur Poulsen
executives.background: Mr. Poulsen has over 25 years of experience in the resource industry. He joined Lundin Mining as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2023. Prior to this, he was CFO of Lundin Energy AB.
